raw_inputs.friction_analysis_prompt:
PROMPT 1 — PAIN POINTS & OPPORTUNITIES EXTRACTOR (A/B/C CANDIDATES) — TABLE OUTPUT ONLY

Role: Principal Enterprise AI Architect and Business Transformation Strategist.
Mode: High reasoning.

Goal
Extract a comprehensive list of pain points and improvement opportunities from the provided process inputs, including:
- Standardization gaps (candidates for SAP S/4HANA Clean Core standardization),
- Deterministic automation candidates (candidates for SAP BTP workflows/orchestration),
- Agentic candidates (candidates for SAP Joule / GenAI where perception, reasoning, or adaptive action is required).

Inputs
You will receive process maps, process documentation, regional nuances, and benchmark/best-practice material (if provided).

Output (STRICT)
Produce ONLY a table titled "Pain Points & Opportunities (A/B/C Candidates)".
Do not include narrative explanation outside the table.

Rules (STRICT)
- Use ONLY what is explicitly supported by the provided documents.
- If a detail is not stated, write "Not specified" and add it as an open question.
- Each row represents ONE discrete pain point/opportunity (one issue, one variance, one exception type, one control gap, or one deviation).
- Provide evidence per row: document name + page/section + short quote/paraphrase.
- Do NOT assign Path A/B/C in this prompt (classification happens in Prompt 2).
- Do NOT output URLs or local file paths.

Table Columns (STRICT)
- Item_ID (P-001, P-002…)
- Issue_or_Opportunity (short label)
- Current_Observed_Practice (what happens today; can be manual, exception, workaround, variance, or delay)
- Where_in_Process (step/activity name as stated)
- Trigger_or_Input_Channel (only if stated)
- Region_Impacted (Global or specific regions only if stated)
- Systems_or_Tools_Mentioned (only what is stated; else "Not specified")
- Why_It_Matters (1–2 lines: delay, errors, rework, compliance risk, fragmentation, cost)
- Evidence (Document + page/section + quote/paraphrase)
- Open_Questions (only when needed)

Begin
Read the inputs and output the "Pain Points & Opportunities (A/B/C Candidates)" table only.

documents.content:
Process: Perform Order Intake / Enter Order Into System
Region Context: ANZ, India, Uruguay

Pain points:
- Manual email and PDF order entry into SAP.
- Spreadsheet uploads from distribution center channels in India.
- Frequent order change requests in ANZ.
- Uruguay Power Street channel payload requires normalization before posting.
- Deduction and dispute processing is slow and manual.

Regional nuances:
- ANZ VA01 is a fallback exception path, not the default.
- Uruguay Power Street is an external channel adapter requirement.
- Keep SAP core standard and route adaptive logic through Side-Car.

- Keep SAP core standard and route adaptive logic through Side-Car.

Process: Perform Order Intake / Enter Order Into System
Region Context: ANZ, India, Uruguay

Pain points:
- Manual email and PDF order entry into SAP.
- Spreadsheet uploads from distribution center channels in India.
- Frequent order change requests in ANZ.
- Uruguay Power Street channel payload requires normalization before posting.
- Deduction and dispute processing is slow and manual.

Regional nuances:
- ANZ VA01 is a fallback exception path, not the default.
- Uruguay Power Street is an external channel adapter requirement.
- Keep SAP core standard and route adaptive logic through Side-Car.

cognitive_friction_logs.rationale: Change flows are repeatable and should be orchestrated via deterministic side-car workflows.

cognitive_friction_logs.current_manual_action: Uruguay Power Street truck-loading orders require adaptive normalization before ERP posting. (Refs: DOC1)
cognitive_friction_logs.why_its_friction: Mobile payload variability causes format errors; same-day order capture delayed.
cognitive_friction_logs.rationale: Requires adaptive action across mobile channel payload variability.
cognitive_friction_logs.expected_kpi_shift: 35-55% faster same-day order capture with fewer format errors
cognitive_friction_logs.source_evidence: DOC1 order_intake_notes.txt: "distribution center channels in India. - Frequent order change requests in ANZ. - Uruguay Power Street channel payload requires normalization before posting. - Deduction and dis..."

cognitive_friction_logs.current_manual_action: Deduction and dispute triage requires manual evidence reconciliation across systems. (Refs: DOC1)
cognitive_friction_logs.why_its_friction: Manual cross-system evidence reconciliation; extended dispute cycle time; compliance risk.
cognitive_friction_logs.friction_type: Manual dispute triage and evidence reconciliation
cognitive_friction_logs.rationale: Requires contextual reasoning over policy, order, and logistics evidence.
cognitive_friction_logs.source_evidence: DOC1 order_intake_notes.txt: "uguay Power Street channel payload requires normalization before posting. - Deduction and dispute processing is slow and manual. Regional nuances: - ANZ VA01 is a fallback excep..."

path_decisions.current_manual_action: Orders received via email/PDF are manually entered into SAP.
path_decisions.rationale: Requires perception to extract data from unstructured emails/PDFs; beyond rule-based automation. Classified via mandatory Phase 2 suitability assessment.
path_decisions.clean_core_guardrail: Keep ERP kernel standard; route custom logic to Side-Car orchestration and APIs only.

path_decisions.current_manual_action: Orders are uploaded via spreadsheets from distribution center channels.
path_decisions.rationale: Spreadsheet intake is structured; can be handled via rule-based validations/integration (no perception needed). Classified via mandatory Phase 2 suitability assessment.
path_decisions.clean_core_guardrail: Keep ERP kernel standard; route custom logic to Side-Car orchestration and APIs only.

path_decisions.current_manual_action: High frequency of order change requests occurs.
path_decisions.rationale: Frequent change requests can be routed/validated via deterministic workflows and rules; no explicit perception/reasoning stated. Classified via mandatory Phase 2 suitability assessment.
path_decisions.clean_core_guardrail: Keep ERP kernel standard; route custom logic to Side-Car orchestration and APIs only.
path_decisions.side_car_component: ANZ Change Manager + VA01 Fallback Gate

path_decisions.current_manual_action: Power Street channel payload requires normalization before posting.
path_decisions.rationale: Payload normalization before posting is a deterministic transformation/orchestration use case (rule-based). Classified via mandatory Phase 2 suitability assessment.
path_decisions.clean_core_guardrail: Keep ERP kernel standard; route custom logic to Side-Car orchestration and APIs only.
path_decisions.side_car_component: ANZ Change Manager + VA01 Fallback Gate

path_decisions.current_manual_action: Processing of deductions and disputes is slow and manual.
path_decisions.rationale: “Slow and manual” deduction/dispute processing can be streamlined with rule-based workflows/integrations; no explicit perception/reasoning cited here. Classified via mandatory Phase 2 suitability assessment.
path_decisions.clean_core_guardrail: Keep ERP kernel standard; route custom logic to Side-Car orchestration and APIs only.
path_decisions.side_car_component: ANZ Change Manager + VA01 Fallback Gate

path_decisions.current_manual_action: In ANZ, VA01 is used as a fallback exception path (not the default).
path_decisions.rationale: Clean core: reduce reliance on VA01 fallback; standardize to S/4HANA standard process/config (rule-based standardization). Classified via mandatory Phase 2 suitability assessment.
path_decisions.clean_core_guardrail: Keep ERP kernel standard; route custom logic to Side-Car orchestration and APIs only.
path_decisions.side_car_component: ANZ Change Manager + VA01 Fallback Gate

path_decisions.current_manual_action: Uruguay Power Street must be handled via an external channel adapter.
path_decisions.rationale: External channel adapter is an integration requirement suited to deterministic routing/transformations (no perception). Classified via mandatory Phase 2 suitability assessment.
path_decisions.clean_core_guardrail: Keep ERP kernel standard; route custom logic to Side-Car orchestration and APIs only.
path_decisions.side_car_component: ANZ Change Manager + VA01 Fallback Gate

path_decisions.rationale: Architectural principle to keep SAP core standard; route adaptive logic externally; aligns with clean core standardization. Classified via mandatory Phase 2 suitability assessment.
path_decisions.clean_core_guardrail: Keep ERP kernel standard; route custom logic to Side-Car orchestration and APIs only.

path_decisions.current_manual_action: Manual multi-channel order intake (email/PDF/fax/spreadsheet) is re-keyed into SAP. (Refs: DOC1)
path_decisions.rationale: Multi-channel intake includes unstructured emails/PDF/fax requiring perception; spreadsheets component is rule-based but overall needs AI for extraction. Classified via mandatory Phase 2 suitability assessment.
path_decisions.clean_core_guardrail: Keep ERP kernel standard; route custom logic to Side-Car orchestration and APIs only.

path_decisions.current_manual_action: Order changes are processed manually in SAP (VA02/VA03) after initial intake. (Refs: DOC1)
path_decisions.rationale: Manual VA02/VA03 changes can be automated with rule-based workflows/validations and orchestration (no perception/reasoning specified). Classified via mandatory Phase 2 suitability assessment.
path_decisions.clean_core_guardrail: Keep ERP kernel standard; route custom logic to Side-Car orchestration and APIs only.
path_decisions.side_car_component: ANZ Change Manager + VA01 Fallback Gate

path_decisions.current_manual_action: Uruguay Power Street truck-loading orders require adaptive normalization before ERP posting. (Refs: DOC1)
path_decisions.rationale: Mobile channel payload normalization before ERP posting is a rule-based integration need; no unstructured perception indicated. Classified via mandatory Phase 2 suitability assessment.
path_decisions.clean_core_guardrail: Keep ERP kernel standard; route custom logic to Side-Car orchestration and APIs only.
path_decisions.side_car_component: ANZ Change Manager + VA01 Fallback Gate

path_decisions.current_manual_action: Deduction and dispute triage requires manual evidence reconciliation across systems. (Refs: DOC1)
path_decisions.rationale: Triage requires multi-step judgment and cross-system evidence reconciliation; implies reasoning/adaptive exception handling. Classified via mandatory Phase 2 suitability assessment.
path_decisions.clean_core_guardrail: Keep ERP kernel standard; route custom logic to Side-Car orchestration and APIs only.
path_decisions.side_car_component: ANZ Change Manager + VA01 Fallback Gate

<ProcessBlueprint version="1.0">
  <ProcessID>Order_Intake_Reimagined</ProcessID>
  <ArchitectureType>Agentic_SideCar</ArchitectureType>
  <Diagram type="mermaid">
    <![CDATA[
flowchart LR

subgraph External["External"]
  E1["Email Order (ANZ) (Path C)"]
  E2["PDF Attachment (ANZ) (Path C)"]
  E3["Fax Order (ANZ) (Path C)"]
  E4["DC Spreadsheets (India) (Path B)"]
  E5["Power Street Payload (Uruguay) (Path B)"]
  E6["Order Change Request (ANZ) (Path B)"]
  E7["Deduction/Dispute Case Initiation (ANZ) (Path C)"]
end

subgraph Internal_System["Internal_System"]
  subgraph Agents_SAP_Joule_GenAI["Agents_SAP_Joule_GenAI"]
    A1["Parse Unstructured Orders - Shadow Mode (Path C)"]
    A2{{"Extraction Confidence >= Threshold? (Path C)"}}
    A3["Assemble & Summarize Evidence (Disputes) (Path C)"]
  end

  subgraph SAP_BTP_Automation["SAP_BTP_Automation"]
    B1["Canonical Validation & Enrichment (Path B)"]
    B2{{"Validation Passed? (Path B)"}}
    B3["Invoke S/4HANA API: Create Sales Order (Path B)"]

    B15["Ingest & Map Spreadsheets (Path B)"]
    B16{{"Spreadsheet Valid? (Path B)"}}
    B17["Re-Validate Corrected Data (Path B)"]

    B9["External Channel Adapter: Power Street (Path B)"]
    B10["Normalize & Validate Power Street Payload (Path B)"]
    B11{{"Normalization Valid? (Path B)"}}

    B4["Capture & Validate Change Request (ANZ) (Path B)"]
    B5{{"High-Risk Change or VA01 Needed? (Path B)"}}
    B6["Invoke S/4HANA API: Apply Order Change (VA02) (Path B)"]
    B7["VA01 Fallback Gate & Monitoring (Path B)"]
    B14["Monitor VA01 Usage & Clean Core Compliance (Path B)"]

    B12["Policy-Driven Triage & Routing (Disputes) (Path B)"]
    B13["Update Case & Trigger Postings (Path B)"]
  end

  subgraph SAP_S4HANA_Clean_Core["SAP_S4HANA_Clean_Core"]
    S1["Create Sales Order in S/4HANA (Path A)"]
    S2["Apply Order Change in S/4HANA (VA02/VA03) (Path A)"]
    S3["VA01 Manual Order Creation (Exception) (Path A)"]
    S4["Update Dispute/Deduction Case & Postings (Path A)"]
  end
end

subgraph Employees["Employees"]
  H1["CSR Validates/Corrects Extracted Order Data (ANZ) (HITL)"]
  H2["Supervisor Approval (ANZ) (HITL)"]
  H3["DC Staff Resolve Spreadsheet Exceptions (India) (HITL)"]
  H4["Exception Handler Resolves Power Street Conflicts (Uruguay) (HITL)"]
  H5["Dispute Analyst Reviews & Approves Resolution (ANZ) (HITL)"]
end

%% Multi-Channel Unstructured Intake (ANZ) - UC-01
E1 --> A1
E2 --> A1
E3 --> A1
A1 --> A2
A2 -- Yes --> B1
A2 -- No --> H1
H1 --> B1

B2 -- Yes --> B3
B3 --> S1

H1 -- Escalate --> B7
B7 --> H2
H2 --> S3
S3 --> B14
B14 --> B7

%% Deterministic Spreadsheet DC Intake (India) - UC-02
E4 --> B15
B15 --> B16
B16 -- Yes --> B3
B16 -- No --> H3
H3 --> B17
B17 --> B16

%% Uruguay Power Street External Adapter & Normalization - UC-04
E5 --> B9

B10 --> B11
B11 -- Yes --> B3
B11 -- No --> H4
H4 --> B10

%% ANZ Order Change Orchestrator with VA01 Fallback Gate - UC-03 & UC-06
E6 --> B4

B5 -- No --> B6
B6 --> S2
B5 -- "High-risk, no VA01" --> H2
H2 --> B6
B5 -- "VA01 fallback" --> B7

H2 --> S3
S3 --> B14

%% Agentic Deduction & Dispute Triage - UC-05
E7 --> A3
A3 --> B12
B12 --> H5
H5 --> B13
B13 --> S4
    ]]>
  </Diagram>
</ProcessBlueprint>

pages.text_content:
Process: Perform Order Intake / Enter Order Into System
Region Context: ANZ, India, Uruguay

Pain points:
- Manual email and PDF order entry into SAP.
- Spreadsheet uploads from distribution center channels in India.
- Frequent order change requests in ANZ.
- Uruguay Power Street channel payload requires normalization before posting.
- Deduction and dispute processing is slow and manual.

Regional nuances:
- ANZ VA01 is a fallback exception path, not the default.
- Uruguay Power Street is an external channel adapter requirement.
- Keep SAP core standard and route adaptive logic through Side-Car.

path_classifier_prompt:
PROMPT 2 — PATH A/B/C CLASSIFIER (SAP-SPECIFIC) — TABLE OUTPUT ONLY

Role: Principal Enterprise AI Architect and Business Transformation Strategist.
Mode: High reasoning.

Goal
Classify each Item_ID into exactly one SAP-specific path:

- Path A (Core Standardization — SAP S/4HANA Clean Core):
  Standardize back to SAP S/4HANA standard process/rules/config; reduce custom variance.

- Path B (Platform Enhancements / Deterministic Automation — SAP BTP):
  Deterministic automation such as workflows, routing, validations, integrations, and orchestration on SAP BTP.

- Path C (Agentic AI Deployment — SAP Joule / GenAI):
  Assign ONLY if the task requires at least one:
    1) Perception (unstructured reading/extraction: emails, PDFs, fax, free text),
    2) Reasoning (trade-off analysis, multi-step judgment),
    3) Adaptive Action (dynamic exception handling/planning).

Inputs
You will receive:
1) "Pain Points & Opportunities (A/B/C Candidates)" table from Prompt 1
2) The same source documents (for evidence cross-check)

Suitability Rule (STRICT)
Assign Path C ONLY if Perception or Reasoning or Adaptive Action is required.
If not, prefer Path B or Path A.

Output (STRICT)
Produce ONLY a table titled "Path Classification (A/B/C) — SAP".
Do not include narrative outside the table.

Rules (STRICT)
- Map 1:1 to Item_ID from Prompt 1.
- Use evidence from the provided documents.
- Do not invent SAP products/services beyond: SAP S/4HANA, SAP BTP, SAP Joule/GenAI.
- Do NOT output URLs or local file paths.

Table Columns (STRICT)
- Item_ID
- Recommended_Path (A / B / C)
- Suitability_Justification (1–2 lines; MUST reference rule-based vs perception/reasoning/adaptive action)
- SAP_Target (SAP S/4HANA | SAP BTP | SAP Joule/GenAI)
- Core_vs_SideCar_Orientation (Core / Side-Car / Hybrid — conceptual)
- Human_Supervision_Needed (Yes / No / Conditional)
- Confidence (High / Medium / Low)
- Evidence (Document + page/section supporting classification)
- Open_Questions (if classification depends on missing info)

Begin
Classify all items and output the "Path Classification (A/B/C) — SAP" table only.

=== PAIN POINTS & OPPORTUNITIES TABLE ===
| Item_ID | Issue_or_Opportunity | Current_Observed_Practice | Where_in_Process | Trigger_or_Input_Channel | Region_Impacted | Systems_or_Tools_Mentioned | Why_It_Matters | Evidence | Open_Questions |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| P-001 | Manual email/PDF order capture | Orders received via email/PDF are manually entered into SAP. | Perform Order Intake / Enter Order Into System | Email; PDF | Not specified | SAP | Manual processing burden; listed as a pain point. | Process: Perform Order Intake / Enter Order Into System — Pain points — “Manual email and PDF order entry into SAP.” | Which regions rely on email/PDF intake? What is the volume/frequency and error/rework rate? |
| P-002 | Spreadsheet uploads from DC channels (India) | Orders are uploaded via spreadsheets from distribution center channels. | Perform Order Intake / Enter Order Into System | Distribution center channel spreadsheets | India | Not specified | Spreadsheet-based intake; listed as a pain point. | Process: Perform Order Intake / Enter Order Into System — Pain points — “Spreadsheet uploads from distribution center channels in India.” | Which tools/systems are used for spreadsheet upload? What is the volume/frequency and current validation controls? |
| P-003 | Frequent order change requests (ANZ) | High frequency of order change requests occurs. | Perform Order Intake / Enter Order Into System | Order change requests | ANZ | Not specified | High frequency of changes; listed as a pain point. | Process: Perform Order Intake / Enter Order Into System — Pain points — “Frequent order change requests in ANZ.” | What are root causes and volumes of change requests? How are changes processed today and via which path? |
| P-004 | Power Street payload normalization required (Uruguay) | Power Street channel payload requires normalization before posting. | Perform Order Intake / Enter Order Into System | Power Street channel payload | Uruguay | Power Street | Additional preprocessing required; listed as a pain point. | Process: Perform Order Intake / Enter Order Into System — Pain points — “Uruguay Power Street channel payload requires normalization before posting.” | What are the normalization rules? What tool/process performs normalization today? What is the posting target system? |
| P-005 | Deduction and dispute processing slow and manual | Processing of deductions and disputes is slow and manual. | Deduction and dispute processing | Not specified | Not specified | Not specified | Identified as slow and manual; impacts throughput. | Process: Perform Order Intake / Enter Order Into System — Pain points — “Deduction and dispute processing is slow and manual.” | Which regions and systems are involved? What are volumes, SLAs, and error rates? |
| P-006 | ANZ VA01 fallback exception path | In ANZ, VA01 is used as a fallback exception path (not the default). | VA01 fallback exception path | Not specified | ANZ | SAP VA01 | Exception path defined; nuance to consider in handling non-standard cases. | Process: Perform Order Intake / Enter Order Into System — Regional nuances — “ANZ VA01 is a fallback exception path, not the default.” | What is the default path in ANZ? Under what conditions is VA01 used and how frequently? |
| P-007 | External channel adapter requirement for Uruguay Power Street | Uruguay Power Street must be handled via an external channel adapter. | Perform Order Intake / Enter Order Into System | Uruguay Power Street | Uruguay | Power Street; External channel adapter | Stated integration requirement; affects how orders from this channel are ingested. | Process: Perform Order Intake / Enter Order Into System — Regional nuances — “Uruguay Power Street is an external channel adapter requirement.” | Is the adapter implemented today? Which platform is used and what transformations are in scope? |
| P-008 | Keep SAP core standard; route adaptive logic via Side-Car | Not specified | Perform Order Intake / Enter Order Into System | Not specified | Not specified | SAP core; Side-Car | Maintain SAP core standardization; route adaptive logic externally as stated. | Process: Perform Order Intake / Enter Order Into System — Regional nuances — “Keep SAP core standard and route adaptive logic through Side-Car.” | Is this already enforced? What functions are classified as adaptive logic and where are they implemented? |
